since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.36%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.98% · Gold -1.12% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.36%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at -9.92%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.60%, WDAY +4.10%, INTU +3.32%, NOW +2.59%, META +2.55%. Laggards: AMBA -9.92%, INTC -9.66%, TER -9.59%, AVAV -8.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.83% at $149.47
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
